docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY HERNANDO ADRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDO ADRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,258.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,010.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $30.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $305.51 AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA ROMEO A. WORK ADD.- C/O SNYDER/NEWELL, INC.
